skills.title: AI-Driven Development Workflow
skills.description: A structured development methodology that leverages AI agents to accelerate the Software Development Lifecycle. I design Spec-driven execution plans, configure AI agents with project-specific skills, and operate the entire development cycle from the terminal using specialized AI CLI tools. Tasks are executed through structured specifications instead of random code generation, while automated review systems ensure quality and standards compliance. My role remains central in validating results, solving complex problems, and refining implementations. AI is not a replacement for my engineering skills — it is a force multiplier that amplifies productivity and development speed.

hero.headline: AI-Assisted Development Workflow
hero.subHeadline: A structured 5-stage development cycle where AI accelerates execution while I retain full control over architecture, decisions, and quality. Not random code generation — spec-driven engineering.

overview.title: THE WORKFLOW
overview.subtitle: Five distinct stages that transform a requirement into production-quality code, each with a clear division of responsibility between human judgment and AI execution.

steps.label: Planning
steps.summary: Define scope, success criteria, and create a structured execution brief that the AI agent follows.

steps.label: Context Prep
steps.summary: Gather existing codebase context, set up agent skills, and prepare precise prompts for AI interaction.

steps.label: Execution
steps.summary: AI implements code against the spec while I monitor progress, review outputs, and provide real-time guidance.

steps.label: Verification
steps.summary: Run tests, validate acceptance criteria, check for regressions, and ensure the implementation meets spec.

steps.label: Review
steps.summary: Final quality audit — code review, architecture fit, performance assessment, and documentation update.

planning.title: Planning
planning.purpose: The planning phase ensures every task has a clear objective, success criteria, and a structured execution plan before any code is written. This prevents wasted effort and keeps AI agents focused on well-defined goals.
planning.humanRole: I define the task scope, write the execution brief, set acceptance criteria, and approve the plan before execution begins.
planning.aiRole: The AI agent analyzes the brief, asks clarifying questions, and confirms understanding of the task boundaries and expected outcomes.
planning.whyMatters: Every minute spent in planning saves ten minutes in rework. This phase is where human experience and domain knowledge create the blueprint that guides the entire cycle.

contextPrep.title: Context Preparation
contextPrep.purpose: AI agents are only as good as the context they receive. This phase gathers relevant code, documentation, and configuration so the agent can make informed decisions aligned with the project's existing patterns.
contextPrep.humanRole: I curate the relevant files, write clear instructions, configure agent skills, and provide background knowledge the AI needs to work effectively.
contextPrep.aiRole: The AI ingests the provided context, maps dependencies, identifies relevant patterns, and prepares its working environment for the task.
decisions: How to frame the task for the AI
prevents: AI generating code that doesn't fit the codebase
contextPrep.whyMatters: The quality of context directly determines the quality of output. This is the single highest-leverage phase for getting great results from AI assistance.

execution.title: Execution
execution.purpose: With a solid plan and rich context, the AI implements the solution. I monitor progress, review intermediate outputs, and step in when the agent needs guidance on complex decisions.
execution.humanRole: I run the AI agent, review generated code in real-time, provide feedback, make architectural decisions, and approve or reject implementations.
execution.aiRole: The AI generates code according to the spec, follows the defined patterns, implements features, and flags any ambiguities it encounters.
execution.whyMatters: This is where the AI's speed meets human judgment. The agent generates rapidly, but every output passes through my filter before it enters the codebase.

verification.title: Verification
verification.purpose: Every implementation must be validated against the acceptance criteria. This phase catches regressions, edge cases, and quality issues before they reach production.
verification.humanRole: I review test results, verify edge cases are handled, check for regressions in related features, and sign off on quality.
verification.aiRole: The AI runs automated tests, checks type safety, validates against the spec, and reports any failures or warnings.
decisions: What needs to be fixed before merge
verification.whyMatters: Verification is the safety net. It ensures that speed from AI assistance never comes at the cost of quality or reliability.

review.title: Review
review.purpose: The final stage is a holistic quality audit before code enters the main branch. This covers code quality, architecture fit, performance, security, and maintainability.
review.humanRole: I perform the final code review, assess architecture alignment, check for technical debt, ensure documentation is updated, and approve the merge.
review.aiRole: The AI provides automated code review feedback, suggests improvements, checks for security issues, and validates coding standards compliance.
prevents: Poor code quality entering the codebase
review.whyMatters: This is the final human gate. Every line of code that reaches production has been planned, executed with AI assistance, verified, and reviewed by me.

rows.human: Define scope, write execution brief, set acceptance criteria
rows.ai: Analyze brief, confirm understanding, identify risks

rows.human: Curate context, configure skills, write prompts
rows.ai: Ingest context, map dependencies, prepare environment

rows.human: Review output, guide decisions, approve or reject
rows.ai: Generate code per spec, follow patterns, flag ambiguities

rows.human: Verify edge cases, check regressions, sign off
rows.ai: Run tests, validate spec, report failures

rows.human: Final code review, assess architecture, approve merge
rows.ai: Automated review, suggest improvements, check compliance

cards.title: Speed Without Chaos
cards.desc: AI generates code exponentially faster than manual writing, but the spec-driven structure prevents the chaos of random generation. You get velocity with direction.

cards.title: Quality Through Process
cards.desc: Each stage has explicit quality gates. Planning defines done. Verification validates it. Review audits it. Quality is engineered into the process, not hoped for.

cards.title: Human Judgment at Every Gate
cards.desc: AI never makes unsupervised decisions. Every output is reviewed, every architectural choice is mine. The agent accelerates — I decide.

cards.title: Context That Compounds
cards.desc: Each cycle feeds into the next. The more context you build, the better the AI performs. Over time, the agent learns your patterns, preferences, and codebase.

cards.title: Full Ownership, Zero Surrender
cards.desc: I remain the sole author of the final product. AI is a tool in my toolkit — not a co-pilot, not a replacement. Every line shipped is mine to own and maintain.

exampleFlow.title: Example: Adding a Feature
exampleFlow.task: Add a theme toggle (dark/light mode) to the portfolio — respecting system preference and persisting user choice.

stages.action: Define scope: toggle UI, CSS variables, localStorage persistence, system preference detection
Share existing globals.css, layout.tsx, theme-related utilities, and the Tailwind config
AI generates the toggle component, CSS variable swap logic, and integration into the layout
Check: toggle works, preference persists, system theme is detected, no visual regressions
Review component structure, CSS approach, accessibility (contrast), and merge
